signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea via Trading Economics[1].
